hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Vakadikeva na demo veisemati, vakatovotovo, kei na ivakaraitaki vakamisini mai na noda timi ni idinia.

hero.title: Innovation Lab
hero.description: Eda vakadikeva na iyalayala ni cakacaka ena AI, automation, kei na ivakarau veisoliyaki, qai vakadewataka na vakadidike vakadonui ki na rawa ni buli nuitaki.
hero.secondary: Veivosakitaka e dua na Cakacaka Vata

researchAreas.title: iWasewase ni Vakadidike
researchAreas.description: Na iwasewase yadua ni vakanamata e veisotari na vakadidike ni vakadidike kei na gaunisala ni kena vakayacori me baleta na ivakarau ni vuravura dina.

detailedFocusBriefs.title: iTukutuku Vakamatailalai ni Vakanamata
detailedFocusBriefs.description: Na sasaga ni vakadidike ena gauna oqo sa toso tiko mai na veivakadeitaki ni vale ki na ituvatuva ni kena vakayagataki.

fromLabToProduction.title: Mai na Lab ki na Production
fromLabToProduction.description: Na veika vou ena Horizon e vakarautaki mai na veika e vakau mai, sega ni prototypes duadua ga.

roadmap.title: R&D Roadmap
roadmap.description: E dua na toso cake mai na tarai cake ni rawa ki na adaptive, vakatorocaketaki tikoga na ivakarau ni cakacaka.

publications.title: Tabaki kei na iVakasama
publications.description: Volavola vakamisini kei na kena vakayagataki na itukutuku mai na cakacaka ni veivakavoui e tomani tiko.

appliedAi.title: iVakarau ni AI Vakayagataki
appliedAi.description: Production-focused AI architectures spanning model serving, feature orchestration, and controlled experimentation.

automationFrameworks.title: Automation Frameworks
automationFrameworks.description: Internal automation tooling for deployment safety, incident response, and repeatable engineering workflows.

advancedArchitecture.title: Vakatovotovo ni Architecture Torocake
advancedArchitecture.description: Vakadidike ki na resilient, veisoliyaki architectures optimized me baleta na veiqaravi, vosota na cala, kei na kena ivakatagedegede.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Intelligence at the edge for low-latency decisioning, telemetry processing, and device fleet coordination.

nlp.title: Natural Language Processing
nlp.description: Pipelines ni kila na veimataqali vosa me baleta na classification, extraction, translation, and conversational systems.

evolutionaryAlgorithms.title: Evolutionary Algorithms & Optimization
evolutionaryAlgorithms.description: Na ivakarau ni vakasaqaqara kei na optimization e vakauqeti mai na digidigi ni veika bula me wali kina na bolebole ni idinia cecere.

automationFrameworks.title: Automation Frameworks
automationFrameworks.description: We are building composable workflow frameworks for release orchestration, quality gates, and post-deploy verification to reduce manual friction while improving reliability.

advancedArchitecture.title: Vakatovotovo ni Architecture Torocake
advancedArchitecture.description: Na noda vakatovotovo ni vale e vakanamata ki na iwalewale ni decomposition ni veiqaravi, iwalewale ni resiliency ni veiyasana, kei na waqanivola ni cakacaka me baleta na ivakarau e cakacaka tiko ena ruku ni gagadre volatile.

edgeAndIot.title: Edge Computing & IoT Intelligence
edgeAndIot.description: Eda sa vakadeitaka tiko na droini ni soqo kei na inference ni yasana ka rawa kina na vakatulewa vakatotolo ena noda vanua ena gauna vata kei na kena maroroi na vakatulewa centralized, auditability, kei na ivakarau ni lifecycle governance.

adaptiveCapacityPlanning.title: Tuvatuva ni Adaptive Capacity
adaptiveCapacityPlanning.description: Sa vakadeitaki na prototypes ni labo ki na cakacaka simulated ka qai semati ki na ituvatuva ni autoscaling ni vata.

operationalIntelligence.title: Operational Intelligence
operationalIntelligence.description: Na pipeline ni NLP e toso mai na vakatovotovo vakatulewa ki na cakacaka ni veitokoni ni cakacaka me totolo kina na triage kei na vakasama matata.

optimizationInDeliverySystems.title: Optimization ena iVakarau ni Veikauyaki
optimizationInDeliverySystems.description: Na iwalewale ni evolutionary e vakatovolei ena lab sa vakadewataki ki na idini ni optimization me baleta na tuvatuva kei na veiwasei.

edgeDecisioning.title: Vakatulewa ni Edge
edgeDecisioning.description: IoT kei na vakatovotovo ni inference ni yasana sa vakaukauwataki ki na veiqaravi low-latency vata kei na yalani ni nuidei.

now.title: Yavu ni AI Vakayagataki
now.description: Vakarabailevutaka na gacagaca ni veiqaravi ni ivakaraitaki e rawa ni vakayagataki tale, suite ni vakadidike, kei na ivakatagedegede ni vakadidike ena timi ni ivoli.

next.title: Cakacaka ni Idinia Vakataki Koya
next.description: Operationalize automation frameworks that reduce deployment risk and shorten feedback loops for shipping.

twelveToEighteenMonths.title: Edge-Native Intelligence
twelveToEighteenMonths.description: Scale hybrid o-edge architectures for near real-time inference in latency-sensitive environments.

longHorizon.title: iVakarau ni Optimization Tomani
longHorizon.description: Vakaduavatataka na vakatovotovo, vakadikevi, kei na optimization me rawa ni veisau vakavinaka na ivakarau ni veisau.

aiReliability.title: Idinia na gacagaca ni AI ka nuitaki tikoga ena cakacaka
aiReliability.summary: E dua na rai yaga ena kena vakatautauvatataki na totolo ni vakatovotovo kei na veiliutaki ni cakacaka.

distributedArchitecturePatterns.title: Veisoliyaki na iVakarau ni Architecture me baleta na Vatavata ni Tubu Levu
distributedArchitecturePatterns.summary: Field notes from architecture trials focused on performance, resiliency, and operational simplicity.

roadmappingAppliedRd.title: Roadmapping Applied R&D for Business Outcomes
roadmappingAppliedRd.summary: Na sala eda tuvanaka kina na veivakatorocaketaki me rawa ni toso na veika e kunea mai na prototype ki na yavunilewa e rawa ni vakarautaki.

cta.title: Tara vata kei na Horizon Innovation Lab
cta.description: Veitokani vata kei keda me vakadeitaka vakatotolo na vakasama cecere ka tosoya na vakasama vakadinadinataki ki na ivakarau ni buli taqomaki, scalable.

hero.title: iVakarau ni AI Vakayagataki
hero.description: E dua na rairaraba yaga ni iwalewale ni Horizon droinitaka, deploys, ka cakacakataka na ivakarau ni vuli misini mai na prototype ki na production.

machineLearningPipelines.title: Pipelines ni Vuli Misini
machineLearningPipelines.description: Production AI tekivu ena pipelines reproducible ka semata na itukutuku, vakatovotovo, veivakadeitaki, kei na vakasama.

modelDeploymentPatterns.title: iVakarau ni Deployment ni iVakatakarakara
modelDeploymentPatterns.description: Deployment strategy is selected based on latency requirements, business criticality, and operational complexity.

mlopsOperatingModel.title: iVakarau ni Cakacaka ni MLOps
mlopsOperatingModel.description: Na iwalewale ni MLOps e vakadeitaka na ivakarau ni AI me nuitaki, vakatulewataki, ka scalable ni sa tubu cake na kena vakayagataki.

monitoringAndReliability.title: Vakadikevi kei na Nuitaki
monitoringAndReliability.description: Observability e sogota na iwiliwili ni ivakarau ni ivakaraitaki kei na kena isau ni cakacaka.

dataAndFeatureEngineering.title: Idinia ni iTukutuku kei na iVakatakilakila
dataAndFeatureEngineering.description: Versioned data ingestion, quality checks, and reusable feature definitions create a reliable foundation for model training.

modelDevelopment.title: Vakatorocaketaki ni ivakaraitaki
modelDevelopment.description: Vakatovotovo sa vakamuri vata kei na reproducible configurations, inaki metrics, kei na yavu ni vakatautauvatani vakamisini.

validationAndSafetyGates.title: Matamata ni veivakadeitaki kei na veitaqomaki
validationAndSafetyGates.description: Na ivakaraitaki ni kandida era na rawata na dikevi ni veiqaravi, kaukauwa, kei na lawatu ni bera ni ra vakadonui me ra vagalalataki.

operationalFeedbackLoops.title: Operational Feedback Loops
operationalFeedbackLoops.description: Na telemetry ni oti na deployment e tukuna na veika me vakaliuci ena veituberi tale, vakatulewa ni rollback, kei na tuvatuva ni iteration e tarava.

realTimeInferenceServices.title: Veiqaravi ni Inference ena Gauna Dina
realTimeInferenceServices.description: Low-latency APIs for interactive applications with autoscaling, caching, and request-level observability.

batchAndStreamingPredictions.title: Predictions ni Batch kei na Streaming
batchAndStreamingPredictions.description: Pipelines tuvanaki kei na soqo me baleta na iwiliwili levu ni scoring ena analytics kei na cakacaka ni cakacaka.

edgeAwareDeployment.title: Vakayagataki ni Edge-Aware
edgeAwareDeployment.description: Hybrid cloud-edge serving patterns for environments require local inference and centralized model governance.

ciCdForModels.title: CI/CD me baleta na ivakaraitaki
ciCdForModels.description: Na cakacaka ni tarai cake vakamisini, vakatovotovo, kei na sereki e vakalailaitaka na ririkotaki ni vakayagataki ena gauna vata e maroroya tiko kina na totolo ni veikauyaki.

modelRegistryAndLifecycle.title: Model Registry kei na Lifecycle
modelRegistryAndLifecycle.description: Na iyaya ni ivakaraitaki versioned vata kei na ivakatagedegede ni torocake, kawa, kei na cakacaka ni veivakadonui e vakatorocaketaka na lewai kei na traceability.

servingInfrastructure.title: Veiqaravi ena iYauqaqa
servingInfrastructure.description: Scalable na veiqaravi vata kei na iwalewale ni rollout me vaka na canary kei na shadow deployments tokona na veisau taqomaki.

monitoringPillars.latencyThroughputAndCostEfficiencyTracki: Latency, throughput, kei na kena vakamuri na isau
monitoringPillars.dataQualityRegressionAlertsAndRemediatio: Na itukutuku vinaka ni veivakayadrati ni regression kei na cakacaka ni veivakadodonutaki
monitoringPillars.auditabilityForComplianceAndIncidentAnal: Na dikevi fika me baleta na vakamuri kei na vakadidike ni veika e yaco

cta.title: Scale Applied AI with Confidence
cta.description: Kevaka o tuvanaka tiko na sasaga ni AI e gadrevi kina na kena vakarautaki kei na kena maroroi ena gauna balavu, e rawa ni veivuke na Horizon ena kena tuvanaki ka cakacakataka na ivakarau taucoko ni bula.
cta.secondary: Vakadikeva eso tale na cakacaka ni labo

hero.title: NLP ni Veimataqali Vosa
hero.description: Vakadikeva na iwalewale ni cakacakataki ni vosa dina kei na iwalewale ni kena vakatorocaketaki ki na ivakarau ni buli ni vosa nuitaki.

foundations.title: Yavu ni NLP
foundations.description: Na cakacaka ni vosa dina e cokovata kina na ivakatakilakila ni vosa kei na vuli ni misini me kauta mai na ibalebale, inaki, kei na ituvatuva mai na ivola.

workbench.title: Cakacaka ni NLP veisemati
workbench.description: Vakayagataka na demo me vakatovotovotaka na vakadidike ni vosa, score ni vakasama, vagalalataki ni entity, kei na ivakarau ni vakadewa ena gauna dina.

productionApplications.title: Na sala e vakayagataka kina o Horizon na NLP ena cakacaka
productionApplications.description: Na rawa ni NLP sa semati ki na cakacaka ni bisinisi vata kei na itataqomaki ni cakacaka kei na ivakarau matata ni kena ivakatagedegede.

reliabilityAndGovernance.title: iVakavuvuli ni Nuitaki kei na Veiliutaki
reliabilityAndGovernance.description: Na NLP ni caka e gadrevi vakalevu cake mai na ivakarau ni ivakaraitaki; E vakatau ena iwalewale ni veitaqomaki kei na kena vakadeitaki tikoga.

foundations.intro1: Modern NLP systems power support automation, search relevance, knowledge extraction, and multilingual collaboration. Na kena vakayacori vakavinaka e gadrevi ruarua na ivakarau vinaka ni ivakaraitaki kei na vakatulewa kaukauwa ni cakacaka.
foundations.intro2: Ena Horizon, eda vakanamata ki na gacagaca ni NLP e cokovata na inference kaukauwa kei na observability, veiliutaki, kei na kena rawa ni vakayagataki.

languageDetection.title: Vakadikevi ni Vosa
languageDetection.description: Raica na vosa mai na iwasewase ni itukutuku lekaleka se balavu me salavata na kerekere ki na pipeline ni cakacakataki dodonu.

sentimentAnalysis.title: Vakadidike ni Sentiment
sentimentAnalysis.description: Extracts emotional intent and polarity for customer intelligence, support triage, and product feedback loops.

entityExtraction.title: Entity Extraction
entityExtraction.description: Raica na veitabana tuvanaki me vaka na yaca, kabani, vanua, kei na tikinisiga mai na itukutuku sega ni tuvatuva.

translation.title: Vakadewa
translation.description: Tokona na cakacaka ni veimataqali vosa ena kena vakadewataki na itukutuku e bulia o ira era vakayagataka se cakacaka ena gauna vata e maroroi tiko kina na kena itukutuku.

supportAndTicketIntelligence.title: Veitokoni kei na Vuku ni Tikite
supportAndTicketIntelligence.description: Classify na kerekere curu mai ena vakatotolotaki, inaki, kei na vakasama me vakatotolotaka na routing kei na ivakarau ni kena isau.

governedContentOperations.title: Cakacaka ni Lewena Vakatulewa
governedContentOperations.description: Vakayagataka na itatarovi ni vosa kilai lawatu kei na jeke ni moderation vata kei na kena ivakarau dodonu kei na takete ni nanuma lesu e rawa ni vakarautaki rawa.

textDrivenBusinessInsights.title: Vakasama ni Bisinisi e Vakayarayarataki ena Text
textDrivenBusinessInsights.description: Aggregate trends from documents, railesuvi, and communications to inform strategy and operational decisions.

evaluationByUseCase.title: Vakadidike ena Kisi ni Vakayagataki
evaluationByUseCase.description: Na ivakaraitaki era benchmarked vata kei na datasets vakatabakidua ni vanua ni bera ni vakatulewa ni vagalalataki.

humanInTheLoopSafeguards.title: Veitaqomaki ni Tamata-in-the-Loop
humanInTheLoopSafeguards.description: Na predictions cecere e oka kina na sala ni railesuvi, lawa ni escalation, kei na sikinala ni veivakabauti matata.

continuousMonitoring.title: Vakadikevi Tikoga
continuousMonitoring.description: Na drift, latency, kei na degradation ni ituvaki vinaka era sa vakamuri tikoga me rawa kina na retraining kei na rollback e proactive.

hero.title: Genetic Algorithm Simulation
hero.description: Vakadikeva na computation ni evolutionary ena dua na draki ni veisemati ka raica na sala e vakadewataki kina na ivakavuvuli vata ga oqo ki na ivakarau ni optimization ni cakacaka.

scientificFoundation.title: Yavu ni Vakadidike
scientificFoundation.description: Genetic algorithms are population-based optimization methods inspired by natural selection and adaptation.

interactiveEnvironment.title: Interactive Evolution Environment
interactiveEnvironment.description: Cicivaka na ivakaraitaki mo raica na vakatorocaketaki ni kaukauwa ena veitabatamata yadua ka dikeva na sala e vakayarayarataka kina na vatuka na kaukauwa ni digidigi.

productionUse.title: Na sala e vakayagataka kina oqo o Horizon ena cakacaka
productionUse.description: Na gacagaca ni vakasaqaqara vata ga e vakayagataki ena demo oqo e tukuna na pipelines ni optimization vakayagataki ena ivakarau ni cakacaka.

applicationDomains.title: Vanua ni iVolakerekere Rabailevu
applicationDomains.description: Evolutionary optimization e yaga vakalevu sara ena ivakarau e tiko kina na inaki kaukauwa kei na veisaqasaqa ni yasana.

scientificFoundation.intro1: E sega ni vakasaqara e dua na iwali ena dua na gauna, na genetic algorithms e vakatorocaketaka e dua na iwiliwili duidui ni veiqaravi. Na itabatamata yadua e dikevi ena dua na cakacaka ni kaukauwa ka vakavinakataki ena digidigi, crossover, kei na mutation.
scientificFoundation.intro2: Oqo e vakavuna me ra mana me baleta na leqa cecere kei na non-linear constraints, na vanua e yaco kina na iwalewale deterministic me brittle se computationally saulevu.

selection.title: Digitaki
selection.description: O ira na vakatutu vinaka era na rawa ni bula ka vakayarayarataki ira na itabatamata e tarava.

crossover.title: Veikauwaitaki
crossover.description: Na itovo kaukauwa era cokovata tale me bulia na iwali vou ni kandida kei na kaukauwa veiwaki.

mutation.title: Veisau
mutation.description: Na randomness vakatulewa e vakavuna na duidui me kakua kina ni tu vakadua na vakasaqaqara ena optima ni vanua.

convergence.title: Convergence
convergence.description: Ena vuqa na itabatamata, era sa gole yani na lewenivanua ki na iwali tudei ka cecere.

resourceScheduling.title: Tuvatuva ni iVurevure
resourceScheduling.description: Eda vakayagataka na iwalewale ni evolutionary me vakavinakataki kina na ituvatuva ni multi-constraint ena vanua e sega ni rawa kina na vakasaqaqara kaukauwa.

architectureTuning.title: Architecture Tuning
architectureTuning.description: Candidate infrastructure configurations are tested iteratively to improve performance and cost efficiency.

continuousOptimization.title: Optimization Tomani
continuousOptimization.description: Optimization jobs run in controlled loops with telemetry feedback so systems adapt as demand profiles shift.

routeAndLogisticsPlanning.title: Tuvatuva ni Sala kei na Logistics
routeAndLogisticsPlanning.description: Na tuvatuva ni veikauyaki kei na vakau e yaga mai na vakasaqaqara ni evolutionary ni veisau vakatotolo na constraints.

modelAndHyperparameterSearch.title: Vakasaqaqara ni ivakaraitaki kei na hyperparameter
modelAndHyperparameterSearch.description: Genetic search can discover high-quality model configurations when objective surfaces are noisy and non-linear.

portfolioAndAllocationProblems.title: Leqa ni Portfolio kei na Allocation
portfolioAndAllocationProblems.description: Optimization ena ruku ni inaki ni veisisivi e rawa ni tuvanaki me vaka na tradeoffs ni kaukauwa ena veisau ni ituvatuva ni veiqaravi.
